page_content:
Formerly: WMST378.

WGSS379 Topics in Women, Gender, and Sexuality Studies (1-3 Credits) Thematic exploration of a topic in women, gender, and sexuality studies. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

Formerly: WMST379.

WGSS408 Literature by Women Before 1800 (3 Credits)

Selected writings by women in the medieval and early modern era. Prerequisite: Must have completed two English courses in literature; or permission of the Harriet Tubman Department of Women, Gender, and Sexuality Studies.

Cross-listed with: ENGL408.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
